raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "cup",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The cup (5x5x8 cm) is directly in front of the lighter box, within reach of the right arm, and there is enough free space around it for the claw to approach from the side without colliding with the boxes.",
    "Postcondition": "The cup is securely held by the right claw and no longer rests on the table."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "table area front-right, away from the boxes",
    "Action concept": "Place",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "The robot is holding the cup and the designated front-right area of the table is clear of obstacles.",
    "Postcondition": "The cup is placed on the specified table area, releasing it from the gripper, leaving the workspace in front of the boxes unobstructed."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "lighter box",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "frontally",
    "Precondition": "The cup has been moved away, and there is at least 10 cm of free space to the right side of the lighter box so it can be shifted without contacting table edges or other objects.",
    "Postcondition": "The lighter box is displaced 10 cm to the right, creating a clear lateral gap between the lighter and darker boxes."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 4,
    "Target": "darker box",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "A sufficient gap exists on both left and right sides of the darker box, allowing the two arms to approach laterally and clamp the box without interference from the lighter box.",
    "Postcondition": "The darker box (30×30×30 cm) is firmly clamped between the two end-effectors and lifted off the table, completing the pick-up task."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The cup (5x5x8 cm) is directly in front of the lighter box, within reach of the right arm, and there is enough free space around it for the claw to approach from the side without colliding with the boxes.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The cup is securely held by the right claw and no longer rests on the table.

parsed_json.Target: table area front-right, away from the boxes
parsed_json.Precondition: The robot is holding the cup and the designated front-right area of the table is clear of obstacles.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The cup is placed on the specified table area, releasing it from the gripper, leaving the workspace in front of the boxes unobstructed.

parsed_json.Precondition: The cup has been moved away, and there is at least 10 cm of free space to the right side of the lighter box so it can be shifted without contacting table edges or other objects.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The lighter box is displaced 10 cm to the right, creating a clear lateral gap between the lighter and darker boxes.

parsed_json.Precondition: A sufficient gap exists on both left and right sides of the darker box, allowing the two arms to approach laterally and clamp the box without interference from the lighter box.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The darker box (30×30×30 cm) is firmly clamped between the two end-effectors and lifted off the table, completing the pick-up task.
